summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Viaje360 Travel Diary feature. Backend API fully functional with all endpoints working correctly. Frontend diary flow works end-to-end with successful mood selection, energy/pace input, activities feedback, summary submission, and data persistence. Minor navigation URL issue identified but functionality is intact.

integration_issues.issue: DiaryPromptCard button click doesn't update URL to /plan/diary?day=1 but diary interface loads correctly

passed_tests: Plan page loads correctly with trip data from localStorage
DiaryPromptCard displays with correct text '¿Cómo ha ido el día?' and day information
DiaryPromptCard button is clickable and functional
Diary conversation interface loads with proper header and day information
Greeting message displays correctly: '¡Hola! ¿Cómo ha ido el Día 1?'
Mood selector shows 5 mood options with proper emojis and labels
Mood selector buttons are clickable and responsive
Energy/pace sliders work correctly with default values 3/5
Activities feedback section loads (0 activities processed correctly)
Summary text input accepts user input
Complete button saves diary data successfully
Success redirect back to plan page with query parameters
Success toast appears with message '¡Diario guardado!'
POST /api/diary endpoint accepts valid diary data and returns success (200)
POST /api/diary endpoint validates required fields and returns 400 for missing data
GET /api/diary endpoint works with valid parameters (200)
GET /api/diary endpoint validates parameters and returns 400 for missing data
Full end-to-end diary conversation flow completes successfully
action_item_for_main_agent: Minor fix needed: DiaryPromptCard navigation should properly update URL to /plan/diary?day=1 when clicked. The Link component may need href verification or client-side routing configuration. Functionality works correctly but URL doesn't reflect the navigation state.
